description: One of the big bosses of KAC, Chris! He not only leads the team but checks in with our progress and makes sure everything is up to code 📋 When he’s not making sure we’re locked in, he’s probably out there snipping with his camera 📸 to create new stickers of the team on Instagram 😓 If you see him around campus with his airpods on, chances are he’s blasting EDM to lock in 🎶
degree: Bachelor of Commerce in Economics and Finance
greenFlag: I am always down to eat

description: Another big boss of KAC, Jimmy! Helping to steer the team when we’re off track and making sure everything goes smoothly! Whether it's handling day-to-day tasks or keeping the vibe upbeat, Jimmy’s always on top of it 👏 He’s the life of the party, always bringing laughter and fun to every situation 🥳 If you bring up his Miata, get ready for the yap 🚗It’s freaking awesome 🔥

role: Mascot, with a brand new look
description: Kaco is back! With a brand new look to start the year, he’s the heart of our team ❤️‍🔥 You’ll catch him in basically all our marketing - always modelling for shoots, always camera-ready, and never missing his moment 📸✨ Kaco stays locked in for the team, holding it down behind the scenes and showing up whenever we need him 🫡 A certified big back who’s always down for a munch, so don’t be surprised if your food mysteriously goes missing 🍱😆
fact: Was born in the year of the dragon 🐉
redFlag: Can accidentally breathe fire if he’s too excited

description: Edison is responsible for overseeing KAC’s finances 👏He ensures we have the necessary budget to host all our events! 💸 When he’s not managing the numbers, he’s probably being a sweat on Roblox or being dragged to his 10th Malatang of the week 🍲
greenFlag: CRACKED at roblox gaming (is this even a green flag)

description: One of the many cat lovers of KAC, Ella is our admin hero and AESIR rep ❤️‍🔥! She keeps everything organised and makes sure no one forgets what’s happening 🫡 If you’re wandering around the School of Music, you might hear Ella going crazy on the violin 😮‍💨
greenFlag: I can make a banging tiramisu
redFlag: I randomly stop talking when I’m socially drained

description: THE extrovert herself is our AESIR Rep this year! Helping out with all the behind-the-scenes work for AESIR and making sure we have some fire events this year 🎉 If you find her on campus, chances are she’s yapping away or munching on snacks 😋
fact: I love napping under the sun
